mapper.select: SELECT a.response_id AS response_id, a.question_id AS question_id, a.value AS value FROM survey_response r JOIN survey_answer a ON a.response_id = r.id WHERE r.form_id = #{formId} AND r.quality_flag = 'pass'

SELECT id AS response_id, anon_label AS anon_label, quality_flag AS quality_flag, to_char(submitted_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS submitted_at FROM survey_response WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY submitted_at ASC
SELECT a.response_id AS response_id, a.question_id AS question_id, a.value AS value FROM survey_response r JOIN survey_answer a ON a.response_id = r.id WHERE r.form_id = #{formId}
